goal: Find out where order O1001 is and when it will arrive.
success_criteria: Agent reports status shipped, SwiftShip tracking SS-88231, expected 2026-07-07, without guaranteeing the date.

customer_msg: Hi! Where is my order O1001? My email is maya.fernandes@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Maya! Your order O1001 is on the way. It shipped on July 1st via SwiftShip (tracking SS-88231) and was expected to arrive July 7th. If it doesn’t show by July 9th, let me know and I’ll check further.
